name: SynkNote
author: Panda Hub
description: SynkNote is an outstanding QWERTY virtual piano autoplayer designed specifically for Roblox virtual pianos. Unlike MIDI-based players, it converts classic text-based piano sheets into virtual keyboard keystrokes natively. It earns a perfect Quality score (5.0) for its modern 'Slate Minimal' interface, responsive layouts, and highly accurate chord/sustained note-parsing engine. With high usability (4.8), it offers a compact floating overlay for mobile/small screen support, adjustable BPM controls, and an integrated Anti-Lag system. Ease of Use (4.5) is excellent, featuring a rich built-in catalog of preloaded cloud songs alongside local sheet saving functionality.
howToUse:
1. Execute the script using a compatible Roblox executor that supports keypress and keyrelease functions.
2. Paste any standard text-based QWERTY piano sheet into the notes box, or choose a preloaded song from the built-in Library.
3. Adjust your BPM speed to perfectly time the keystrokes using the direct input or +/- buttons.
4. Press Play or use the '[' hotkey on your keyboard to start playing automatically.
